fact: spoken about transgender journey at the event
message: [35]: The user shares a personal experience of transgender journey and encourages involvement in the LGBTQ community, showing a positive attitude towards their advocacy.
raw_message: Hey Melanie! How's it going? I wanted to tell you about my school event last week. It was awesome! I talked about my transgender journey and encouraged students to get involved in the LGBTQ community. It was great to see their reactions. It made me reflect on how far I've come since I started transitioning three years ago.
reason: Sharing personal experience and encouraging involvement

message: [37]: The user expresses gratitude for supportive backing while giving their LGBTQ+ advocacy talk.
raw_message: Thanks, Mel! Your backing really means a lot. I felt super powerful giving my talk. I shared my own journey, the struggles I had and how much I've developed since coming out. It was wonderful to see how the audience related to what I said and how it inspired them to be better allies. Conversations about gender identity and inclusion are so necessary and I'm thankful for being able to give a voice to the trans community.
